title: How the Russian army lost its military advantage against Ukraine
subhead: Russia is becoming bogged down in the ground war and falling further behind technologically, while its human and oil resources dwindle. The Ukrainian army, supported by an innovative defense industry, has nevertheless been unable to switch to an offensive posture in ground combat.

title: France records 2,025 excess deaths from heatwave, but data remains incomplete
The dashed hopes of France's isolated environment minister
Pope urges US to recommit to tradition of welcoming migrants on nation's 250th anniversary
subhead: On the eve of the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence, history's first US-born pope focused on America's tradition of welcoming migrants, whom he referred to as part of the 'noble vision' of the Founding Fathers.

title: 'The American Revolution': A sweeping historical epic, from 1754 to 1783
subhead: Divided into six episodes, the Ken Burns documentary presents the stark reality of the United States, far from the often romanticized vision of its history.

title: With 'Confessions II,' Madonna celebrates the pleasures of partying, blending glittering hedonism and hypnotic power
subhead: By returning to the dance floor, the American singer finds her comfort zone again on her 15th album and, in the process, reveals a more vulnerable side.

title: Food takes center stage at open air guinguettes along the Loire River
subhead: Fish fritters and carrot-top gazpacho are now on the menus of these convivial waterside spots. This marks a notable step up in quality for these casual dining and imbibing venues, which give pride of place to local products.

Economist Gita Gopinath: 'Rising imbalances among major powers threaten growth and fuel protectionism'
subhead: Harvard University economics professor and former International Monetary Fund official Gita Gopinath expresses concern over the level of US federal debt.

title: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' sparks a Homeric debate in Greece
subhead: The casting of a Black actress as Helen of Troy has ignited fierce controversy in Greece. Some lament what they see as Hollywood's appropriation of Greek mythology, while others emphasize the universal nature of these ancient stories.

title: Early heatwaves are devastating French agriculture and leaving farmers helpless
subhead: Scorched crops, decimated livestock and double-digit production drops: as farmers take stock of the effects of extreme heat, they fear the worst is yet to come.
